hero.main_title: Phone & Computer Repair — Experts at Your Service
hero.subtitle: Hardware & software solutions — experts in phone & computer repair, IT support and web development. Certified parts, precise diagnostics and tailored solutions for individuals and businesses.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From free diagnostics to express repairs, we cover all your technology needs. Click a service to learn more.

cellulaires.title: Phone Repair
cellulaires.desc: Broken screens, batteries, cameras, charging ports. iPhone, Samsung, Huawei and more.

ordinateurs.title: Computer Repair
ordinateurs.desc: PC and Mac — viruses, slowdowns, hard drive, screen, keyboard. Data recovery.

informatique.title: IT Services
informatique.desc: OS installation, network setup, antivirus, automatic backup.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Custom showcase sites, e-commerce and web applications for your business.

cloud.title: Cloud Solutions
cloud.desc: Cloud migration, secure storage, multi-device synchronization.

entretien.title: Maintenance Contracts
entretien.desc: Preventive maintenance for businesses. Priority support and personalized follow-up.

steps.title: Free Diagnostic
steps.desc: Bring your device to our shop or fill out the online form. Our technician assesses it in 30 minutes.

steps.title: Transparent Quote
steps.desc: You receive a detailed quote. No hidden fees — you accept or decline freely.

steps.title: Express Repair
steps.desc: Our certified technicians use OEM-quality parts. Most repairs completed in under 2 hours.

steps.title: Pickup & Tracking
steps.desc: Get your fully tested device back. Track your repair with a ticket number in real time.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.cta: See all our Google reviews · 67 reviews

blog.title: Our Blog
blog.header_sub: Expert tips, best practices and tech news — written by our team of technicians.
blog.techs_available: Our technicians are available Monday to Saturday. Free diagnostic!
